notes: v0.2a (schema split, compact, backend abstraction) completed and tests passing (97 tests). v0.2b (sync, check, SLURM hardening) also complete. Backlog items #140, #141, #142 remain unimplemented. #140 is partially complete (schema_version and slurm_job_id captured; migrations registry in place) but missing: hostname capture, extended provenance fields not yet designed, migration test coverage incomplete. #141 (archive) is design-only in CLAUDE.md; no code. #142 (results management) is entirely undesigned beyond the output_paths field in Run schema.
